Class OtlpLogbackAppender

java.lang.Object
ch.qos.logback.core.spi.ContextAwareBase
ch.qos.logback.core.AppenderBase<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>
io.signoz.springboot.logging.OtlpLogbackAppender
All Implemented Interfaces:
ch.qos.logback.core.Appender<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>, ch.qos.logback.core.spi.ContextAware, ch.qos.logback.core.spi.FilterAttachable<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>, ch.qos.logback.core.spi.LifeCycle
public class OtlpLogbackAppender extends ch.qos.logback.core.AppenderBase<ch.qos.logback.classic.spi.ILoggingEvent>
Logback AppenderBase implementation that forwards log records to a SigNoz (or any OpenTelemetry-compatible) collector via OTLP gRPC.

Configured programmatically by SigNozLoggingAutoConfiguration using values from SigNozProperties. Can also be configured directly in logback-spring.xml for teams that prefer XML configuration: 

<appender name="OTLP" class="io.signoz.springboot.logging.OtlpLogbackAppender">
    <endpoint>http://localhost:4317</endpoint>
    <serviceName>my-app</serviceName>
    <serviceVersion>1.0.0</serviceVersion>
    <environment>production</environment>
</appender>

Each Logback log event is converted to an OpenTelemetry

invalid reference 
io.opentelemetry.api.logs.LogRecord
with:
  • Timestamp from the event
  • Severity mapped from Logback level
  • Body set to the formatted message
  • All MDC fields added as log attributes (prefixed with mdc.)
